attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
MAX(CURRENCY_COUNTRY.BATCH_ID) BATCH_ID,
CURRENCY_COUNTRY.CURRENCY_CODE,
CURRENCY_COUNTRY.ISSUING_TERRITORY_CODE,		 
MAX(CURRENCY_COUNTRY.CREATE_DATETIME) CREATE_DATETIME,
CURRENCY_COUNTRY.ACTION_CODE,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
(
	SELECT 
	SMFC.BATCH_ID, 
	SMFC.CURRENCY_CODE,
	SMFC.ISSUING_TERRITORY_CODE,
	SMFC.CREATE_DATETIME, 
	SMFC.ACTION_CODE, 
	'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE 
	FROM
	$$STGDB.ST_MF_FND_CURRENCIES SMFC
	WHERE SMFC.ISSUING_TERRITORY_CODE IS NOT NULL
	AND NOT EXISTS
		( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC
		WHERE SMFC.ISSUING_TERRITORY_CODE = NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE)
	/*
	Bedrock2.0 change - removed OM flow
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 
	SOFC.BATCH_ID, 
	SOFC.CURRENCY_CODE,
	SOFC.ISSUING_TERRITORY_CODE,
	SOFC.CREATE_DATETIME, 
	SOFC.ACTION_CODE, 
	'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE 
	FROM
	$$STGDB.ST_OM_FND_CURRENCIES SOFC
	WHERE SOFC.ISSUING_TERRITORY_CODE IS NOT NULL
	AND NOT EXISTS 
		( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC
		WHERE SOFC.ISSUING_TERRITORY_CODE = NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE)
	*/	
)CURRENCY_COUNTRY
GROUP BY 
	CURRENCY_COUNTRY.CURRENCY_CODE,
	CURRENCY_COUNTRY.ISSUING_TERRITORY_CODE,
	CURRENCY_COUNTRY.ACTION_CODE

SELECT
TVOUTPUT.BATCH_ID,
TVOUTPUT.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
TVOUTPUT.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE,
TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE AS START_DATE_ACTIVE,
COALESCE(MAX (TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE - INTERVAL '1' DAY) 
OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE  
ROWS BETWEEN 1 FOLLOWING AND 1 FOLLOWING), DATE '3500-01-01') AS END_DATE_ACTIVE,
CAST (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP (0) as TIMESTAMP (0)) as CREATE_DATETIME,
TVOUTPUT.ACTION_CODE,
TVOUTPUT.EXCEPTION_TYPE,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE 
ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE ASC) AS  RANK_INDEX,
(CASE WHEN  RANK_INDEX = 1 AND NCCT.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE IS NOT NULL THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END) AS DML_TYPE
FROM
(
	SELECT 
	BATCH_ID,
	BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
	BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE,
	START_TV_DATE,
	END_TV_DATE,
	CREATE_DATETIME,
	ACTION_CODE,	
	EXCEPTION_TYPE,
     ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TVINPUT.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE,TVINPUT.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
     ORDER BY CREATE_DATETIME DESC) AS ROW_NUM
	FROM
	(
		SELECT
		MAX(CURRENCY_COUNTRY.BATCH_ID) BATCH_ID,
		CURRENCY_COUNTRY.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
		CURRENCY_COUNTRY.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE,
		MAX(CURRENCY_COUNTRY.START_TV_DATE) START_TV_DATE,
		MAX(CURRENCY_COUNTRY.START_TV_DATE) END_TV_DATE,
		MAX(CURRENCY_COUNTRY.CREATE_DATETIME) CREATE_DATETIME,
		CURRENCY_COUNTRY.ACTION_CODE,
		'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE
		FROM (
					SELECT
						SMFC.BATCH_ID,
						NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
						SMFC.CURRENCY_CODE BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE,
						CAST(SMFC.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DATE,
						CAST(SMFC.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) END_TV_DATE,
						SMFC.CREATE_DATETIME,
						SMFC.ACTION_CODE,
						'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE
						FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_FND_CURRENCIES SMFC
						,$$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC
						WHERE	SMFC.ISSUING_TERRITORY_CODE = NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
						AND SMFC.ISSUING_TERRITORY_CODE IS NOT NULL
					/*
					Bedrock2.0 change - removed OM flow
					UNION ALL
						SELECT
						SOFC.BATCH_ID,
						NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE  BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
						SOFC.CURRENCY_CODE BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE,
						CAST(SOFC.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DATE,
						CAST(SOFC.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) END_TV_DATE,
						SOFC.CREATE_DATETIME,
						SOFC.ACTION_CODE,
						'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE
						FROM	$$STGDB.ST_OM_FND_CURRENCIES SOFC
						,$$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC
						WHERE	SOFC.ISSUING_TERRITORY_CODE = NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
						AND  SOFC.ISSUING_TERRITORY_CODE IS NOT NULL
					*/	
					
					UNION ALL
					    SELECT
						SCFC.BATCH_ID,
						NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
						SCFC.CURRENCY_CODE BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE,
						CAST(SCFC.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DATE,
						CAST(SCFC.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) END_TV_DATE,
						SCFC.CREATE_DATETIME,
						SCFC.ACTION_CODE,
						'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE
						FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES SCFC
						,$$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC
						WHERE	SCFC.ISSUING_TERRITORY_CODE = NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
						AND SCFC.ISSUING_TERRITORY_CODE IS NOT NULL
					
			) CURRENCY_COUNTRY
		GROUP BY 
			CURRENCY_COUNTRY.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE,
			CURRENCY_COUNTRY.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
			CURRENCY_COUNTRY.ACTION_CODE
		UNION ALL
		SELECT
			MAX(EMOFC.BATCH_ID) BATCH_ID,
			NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
			EMOFC.CURRENCY_CODE BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE,
			MAX(CAST(EMOFC.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE)) START_TV_DATE,
			MAX(CAST(EMOFC.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE)) END_TV_DATE,
			MAX(EMOFC.CREATE_DATETIME) CREATE_DATETIME,
			EMOFC.ACTION_CODE,
			'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
		FROM	$$EXCEPDB.EX_MF_OM_FND_CURRENCIES EMOFC
			,$$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC
		WHERE	EMOFC.ISSUING_TERRITORY_CODE = NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
			AND EMOFC.ISSUING_TERRITORY_CODE IS NOT NULL
			GROUP BY 
			NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
			EMOFC.CURRENCY_CODE ,
			EMOFC.ACTION_CODE
			
		UNION ALL
		SELECT
			MAX(ECFC.BATCH_ID) BATCH_ID,
			NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
			ECFC.CURRENCY_CODE BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE,
			MAX(CAST(ECFC.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE)) START_TV_DATE,
			MAX(CAST(ECFC.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE)) END_TV_DATE,
			MAX(ECFC.CREATE_DATETIME) CREATE_DATETIME,
			ECFC.ACTION_CODE,
			'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
		FROM	$$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES ECFC
			,$$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC
		WHERE	ECFC.ISSUING_TERRITORY_CODE = NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
			AND ECFC.ISSUING_TERRITORY_CODE IS NOT NULL
			GROUP BY 
			NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
			ECFC.CURRENCY_CODE ,
			ECFC.ACTION_CODE	
		
		UNION ALL
		SELECT
			-999 BATCH_ID,
			NCCT.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
			NCCT.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE,
			NCCT.START_TV_DATE,
			NCCT.END_TV_DATE,
			NCCT.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME CREATE_DATETIME,
			'X' ACTION_CODE,
			'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE
		FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_COUNTRY_TV NCCT
		WHERE (NCCT.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE) IN
						(	SELECT SMFC.CURRENCY_CODE 	 FROM 	$$STGDB.ST_MF_FND_CURRENCIES SMFC
							WHERE SMFC.ISSUING_TERRITORY_CODE IS NOT NULL
							/*
							Bedrock2.0 change - removed OM flow
							UNION
							SELECT SOFC.CURRENCY_CODE 	 FROM 	$$STGDB.ST_OM_FND_CURRENCIES SOFC
							WHERE SOFC.ISSUING_TERRITORY_CODE IS NOT NULL
							*/
							UNION 
							
							SELECT SCFC.CURRENCY_CODE 	 FROM 	$$STGDB.ST_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES SCFC
							WHERE SCFC.ISSUING_TERRITORY_CODE IS NOT NULL
							
							UNION
							
							SELECT ECFC.CURRENCY_CODE  FROM 	$$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES ECFC
							WHERE ECFC.ISSUING_TERRITORY_CODE IS NOT NULL
							AND ECFC.EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI'
							
                            UNION							
							
							
							SELECT EMOFC.CURRENCY_CODE  FROM 	$$EXCEPDB.EX_MF_OM_FND_CURRENCIES EMOFC
							WHERE EMOFC.ISSUING_TERRITORY_CODE IS NOT NULL
							AND EMOFC.EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI'
						)
			AND  NCCT.END_TV_DATE = 16000101
	) TVINPUT
	QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY TVINPUT.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE,TVINPUT.START_TV_DATE 
	ORDER BY TVINPUT.CREATE_DATETIME DESC) = 1
)TVOUTPUT
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_COUNTRY_TV NCCT ON
TVOUTPUT.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE = NCCT.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE
AND NCCT.END_TV_DATE =16000101
WHERE ROW_NUM = 1

SELECT
MAX(CURRENCY_COUNTRY.BATCH_ID) BATCH_ID,
CURRENCY_COUNTRY.CURRENCY_CODE,
CURRENCY_COUNTRY.ISSUING_TERRITORY_CODE,		 
MAX(CURRENCY_COUNTRY.CREATE_DATETIME) CREATE_DATETIME,
CURRENCY_COUNTRY.ACTION_CODE,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
(
SELECT 
	SCFC.BATCH_ID, 
	SCFC.CURRENCY_CODE,
	SCFC.ISSUING_TERRITORY_CODE,
	SCFC.CREATE_DATETIME, 
	SCFC.ACTION_CODE, 
	'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE 
	FROM
	$$STGDB.ST_CG1_FND_CURRENCIES SCFC
	WHERE SCFC.ISSUING_TERRITORY_CODE IS NOT NULL
	AND NOT EXISTS
		( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC
		WHERE SCFC.ISSUING_TERRITORY_CODE = NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE)
	/*
	Bedrock2.0 change - removed OM flow
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 
	SOFC.BATCH_ID, 
	SOFC.CURRENCY_CODE,
	SOFC.ISSUING_TERRITORY_CODE,
	SOFC.CREATE_DATETIME, 
	SOFC.ACTION_CODE, 
	'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE 
	FROM
	$$STGDB.ST_OM_FND_CURRENCIES SOFC
	WHERE SOFC.ISSUING_TERRITORY_CODE IS NOT NULL
	AND NOT EXISTS 
		( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC
		WHERE SOFC.ISSUING_TERRITORY_CODE = NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE)
	*/	
)CURRENCY_COUNTRY
GROUP BY 
	CURRENCY_COUNTRY.CURRENCY_CODE,
	CURRENCY_COUNTRY.ISSUING_TERRITORY_CODE,
	CURRENCY_COUNTRY.ACTION_CODE
